description_long: This rifle features a compact, tactical design with a prominent cylindrical suppressor at the muzzle, colored in a striking combination of gray and red. The main body is constructed from a dark, metallic material with a slightly worn, camouflaged finish, giving it a rugged urban appearance. The stock is short and angular, likely made for close-quarters maneuverability, and the grip is textured for secure handling. A detachable box magazine is visible, with a perforated pattern for weight reduction and style. The rifle is equipped with a raised optical sight, possibly a red dot or holographic type, mounted on the top rail. The overall build suggests a modern, suppressed firearm suitable for stealth operations in urban environments.
description: A compact, modern rifle with a gray and red suppressor, dark camouflaged body, short stock, and a raised optical sight. Features a perforated detachable magazine and a rugged, tactical appearance.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full length of the rifle, highlighting the gray and red suppressor, camouflaged body, short stock, and perforated magazine.
description_view_1: Front view focusing on the circular end of the suppressor, with the red accent visible and the rifle's narrow profile apparent.
description_view_2: Opposite side view displaying the suppressor, body, and stock, with the magazine and sight also visible from this angle.
description_view_3: Rear view showing the back of the stock and the top of the suppressor, with the sight and grip partially visible.
